title: Laws of Exponents | No-Prep Lesson, Worksheet, & Answer Key
description: No-prep lesson bundle covering the product, quotient, and power of a power rules for exponents.

title: Systems of Equations: Solving by Substitution
description: What's Included in This Bundle: Professional Lesson Plan (4 Pages): A detailed 45-minute guide featuring a "Secret Identity" hook comparing algebraic substitution to swapping Clark Kent for Superman.Scaffolded Student Worksheet (4 Pages): Includes high-quality math typography for isolating variables and substituting binomial expressions to solve linear systems algebraically.Detailed Answer Key (3 Pages): Includes specific alerts for common misconceptions, such as failing to distribute a negative sign across a substituted binomial or stopping after finding x and forgetting to solve for y.High-Rigor Extension Tasks: Features DOK 3 challenges requiring students to solve systems where neither variable is initially isolated, requiring multi-step manipulation before substitution can occur.

title: Solving Systems by Elimination | No-Prep Lesson Bundle | 8.EE.C.8.b Mastery
description: Includes a detailed 45-minute guide featuring a real-world money hook asking students to find individual amounts when two friends share 14 dollars with a 4 dollar difference, high-quality math typography for adding or subtracting equations to eliminate one variable, and a detailed answer key.
